title: Dario Schiraldi : How can I integrate my website with Monday.com for better project tracking?
excerpt: Hi everyone, I’m Dario Schiraldi, CEO of Travel Works. I’m looking for advice on how to integrate my website with Monday.com for better project tracking. Specifically, I want to sync our website’s progress with our Monda…

posts.author: darioschiraldi25 (Dario Schiraldi )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I’m Dario Schiraldi, CEO of Travel Works. I’m looking for advice on how to integrate my website with Monday.com for better project tracking. Specifically, I want to sync our website’s progress with our Monday.com boards so we can have a seamless workflow.

Has anyone here implemented integrations between their website and Monday.com? How did you set it up, and what tools or automations worked best?

Regards
Dario Schiraldi
Looking forward to hearing your suggestions and any tips you have!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What tasks are you tracking on your website? And what website backend are you using?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
